description: Create comprehensive Iteration 2 evidence figure with AlphaFold pLDDT, ortholog conservation, alignment, and updated verdict
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(16, 13))
fig.suptitle('Iteration 2: Deepened Evidence — Drosophila Acat1 Peroxisome Hypothesis\n(Q9W3N9 | GO:0005777 | ISM from PMID:22758915)', 
             fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', y=0.99)

# Panel A: AlphaFold pLDDT profile for N-terminal and C-terminal
ax1 = axes[0, 0]

# N-terminal pLDDT values (from AlphaFold analysis)
residues_n = list(range(1, 41))
plddt_n = [44.3, 44.9, 48.0, 51.7, 51.0, 49.3, 51.2, 53.9, 51.0, 46.7,
           48.8, 52.7, 52.5, 51.6, 54.2, 54.4, 56.1, 53.7, 54.0, 64.1,
           76.9, 86.9, 91.3, 96.4, 98.6, 98.8, 98.8, 98.6, 98.7, 98.8,
           98.8, 98.9, 98.9, 98.8, 98.9, 98.8, 98.8, 98.7, 98.2, 98.1]

colors_n = ['#e74c3c' if p < 50 else '#f39c12' if p < 70 else '#3498db' if p < 90 else '#2ecc71' for p in plddt_n]
ax1.bar(residues_n, plddt_n, color=colors_n, width=0.8, edgecolor='none')
ax1.axhline(y=70, color='black', linestyle='--', alpha=0.3, linewidth=0.8)
ax1.axhline(y=90, color='black', linestyle='--', alpha=0.3, linewidth=0.8)
ax1.axvline(x=20.5, color='purple', linestyle='-', alpha=0.7, linewidth=2, label='Predicted MTS cleavage')
ax1.fill_between([0.5, 20.5], [0, 0], [100, 100], alpha=0.1, color='purple')
ax1.set_xlabel('Residue Position', fontsize=10)
ax1.set_ylabel('AlphaFold pLDDT', fontsize=10)
ax1.set_title('A. AlphaFold N-terminal Confidence\n(Low pLDDT = disordered MTS)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax1.set_ylim(0, 105)
ax1.set_xlim(0.5, 40.5)
ax1.legend(fontsize=9)
ax1.text(10, 35, 'MTS\n(disordered)', ha='center', fontsize=9, color='purple', fontweight='bold')
ax1.text(30, 35, 'Mature\nprotein', ha='center', fontsize=9, color='green', fontweight='bold')

# Custom legend for pLDDT categories
legend_patches = [
    mpatches.Patch(color='#e74c3c', label='Very low (<50)'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#f39c12', label='Low (50-70)'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#3498db', label='Confident (70-90)'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#2ecc71', label='Very high (>90)'),
]

# Panel B: C-terminal conservation across insect orders
ax2 = axes[0, 1]

organisms = ['D. melanogaster', 'D. pseudoobscura', 'D. suzukii',
             'F. arisanus', 'M. bicolor', 'C. glomerata',
             'E. variegata', 'B. vosnesenskii', 'T. infestans',
             'C. maculatus', 'T. ni', 'A. plantaginis',
             'L. decemlineata', 'Human ACAT1', 'Yeast POT1']

c_terms = ['-EKL', '-EKL', '-EKL', '-EKL', '-EKL', '-EKL',
           '-EKL', '-EKL', '-EKL', '-EKL', '-EKL', '-EKL',
           '-ERL', '-QKL', '-IKE']

orders = ['Diptera', 'Diptera', 'Diptera',
          'Hymenoptera', 'Hymenoptera', 'Hymenoptera',
          'Lepidoptera', 'Hymenoptera', 'Hemiptera',
          'Coleoptera', 'Lepidoptera', 'Lepidoptera',
          'Coleoptera', 'Mammalia', 'Fungi']

order_colors = {
    'Diptera': '#3498db', 'Hymenoptera': '#e67e22', 'Lepidoptera': '#9b59b6',
    'Hemiptera': '#1abc9c', 'Coleoptera': '#e74c3c', 'Mammalia': '#34495e', 'Fungi': '#7f8c8d'
}

y_pos = np.arange(len(organisms))
bar_colors = [order_colors[o] for o in orders]

ax2.barh(y_pos, [1]*len(organisms), color=bar_colors, alpha=0.6, edgecolor='black', linewidth=0.5)
for i, (org, ct) in enumerate(zip(organisms, c_terms)):
    fontweight = 'bold' if ct == '-EKL' else 'normal'
    color = 'darkgreen' if ct == '-EKL' else 'red'
    ax2.text(0.5, i, ct, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight=fontweight, color=color)

ax2.set_yticks(y_pos)
ax2.set_yticklabels(organisms, fontsize=8)
ax2.set_xlim(0, 1)
ax2.set_xticks([])
ax2.set_title('B. C-terminal Tripeptide Conservation\n(insect ACAT1 orthologs)', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')
ax2.invert_yaxis()

# Add order legend
for order, color in order_colors.items():
    ax2.plot([], [], 's', color=color, alpha=0.6, label=order, markersize=8)
ax2.legend(fontsize=7, loc='lower right', ncol=2)

# Panel C: N-terminal alignment showing MTS cleavage site
ax3 = axes[1, 0]
ax3.axis('off')

# Show alignment with color coding
alignment_text = """
N-terminal Alignment (MTS → Mature protein start):

           MTS (disordered, cleaved)              Mature protein (conserved core)
           ←────────────────────────→              ←──────────────────────────────→

Dmel:      MSARLLQATRRWSAHRNYSS │ KIAEVVVVSAARTPIGSFQS...
Human:     MAVLAALLRSGARSRSPLLRRLVQEIRYVERSY │ VSKPTLKVVVVSAARTPIGSFR...
                                              ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
                                              Conserved: VVVVSAARTPIG

C-terminal Context:

Dmel:      ...CASICNGGGG│ASSILIEKL      ← structured core (pLDDT >97)
Human:     ...CASICNGGGG│ASAMLIQKL      ← structured core
                         ^^^^^^---
                         Core fold, NOT an appended PTS1

Key: │ marks the MTS cleavage / domain boundary
"""
ax3.text(0.02, 0.95, alignment_text, transform=ax3.transAxes, fontsize=9, 
         fontfamily='monospace', verticalalignment='top',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', alpha=0.8))
ax3.set_title('C. Sequence Alignment: MTS and C-terminal Context', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

# Panel D: Updated verdict summary
ax4 = axes[1, 1]
ax4.axis('off')

verdict_text = """VERDICT: OVER-ANNOTATED (strengthened)

New evidence from Iteration 2:

1. C-terminal -EKL is part of catalytic fold
   • Conserved in 15/16 insect orthologs (94%)
   • Not an appended targeting signal
   • AlphaFold pLDDT >97 → structured, buried

2. N-terminal MTS confirmed by AlphaFold
   • Residues 1-20: disordered (pLDDT 44-64)
   • Matches human ACAT1 MTS pattern
   • Shared 'VVVVSAARTPIG' mature start motif

3. No insect ACAT1 has canonical PTS1
   • None of 16 orthologs has -SKL/-AKL/-SRL
   • All have -[EQR]KL (non-functional)

4. Drosophila ScpX has canonical -SKL
   • The genuine peroxisomal thiolase candidate

RECOMMENDATION:
  Remove GO:0005777 (peroxisome) ISM annotation
  Retain GO:0005739 (mitochondrion) HDA annotation
"""

ax4.text(0.05, 0.95, verdict_text, transform=ax4.transAxes, fontsize=9.5, 
         fontfamily='sans-serif', verticalalignment='top',
         bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#fadbd8', alpha=0.9))
ax4.set_title('D. Updated Verdict', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

plt.tight_layout(rect=[0, 0, 1, 0.96])
plt.savefig('iteration2_evidence.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Iteration 2 evidence figure saved.")
